title: City 2023
summary: Mayor Ben Walsh appointed Ryan Shiel as Director of Code Enforcement within the Department of Neighborhood and Business Development. This leadership appointment signals continued focus on code enforcement operations and neighborhood development priorities.
department_refs: Department of Neighborhood and Business Development

political_signal.description: Mayoral appointment of director-level staff indicates executive commitment to code enforcement and neighborhood development as operational priorities.
